title: DarkMagic
description: A performance and visual upgrade to classic minecraft
body:
# Dark Magic  
### A performance and visual upgrade to classic minecraft

This pack builds off of the fabric mod loader and adds many performance enhancements and utilities including:
- Shaders
- Memory Optimizations
- Dark Mode
- Inventory Tweaks
- And More...

This is meant to be purely for performance enhancing and is fully compatible with all other native minecraft instances and servers
